data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. FLYING ADLER returned a better run last time, finishing in the money (19.66) at this track behind Paw Farok in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Top prospect. 2. LITTLE MINNIE jumped cleanly from the rails to lead much the way when third (26.08) at Shepparton in a Grade 5 over 450m. Can measure up. 3. SODA TURKEY finds it hard to win but looks close to breaking through. Finished in the minors last time when second (17.11) at this track making it back to back placings. Form here at the trip sound including four wins. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Well placed and gets her chance. 4. KING CHERRY cannot be written off despite a miss here at his latest outing.","runners":[8,2,3,4],"exclusive":false}
